arts.ttl: AC Milan 'give up pursuit of Man United outcast Marcus Rashford to focus on signing Kyle Walker from Man City'
arts.sum: Serie A rules dictate that top flight Italian clubs can only register one British player in their squad per year. This means they are only able to sign one of Rashford or Walker.

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford’s Transfer Saga: Milan Out of the Race as Dortmund Move In
arts.sum: The transfer market is heating up, and the future of Marcus Rashford has become a focal point of speculation. The Manchester United forward has been linked with several clubs, but recent developments suggest that AC Milan may be stepping back from the race, allowing Borussia Dortmund to take the lead in pursuing the English international. The post Marcus Rashford’s Transfer Saga: Milan Out of the Race as Dortmund Move In appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Man Utd 'seriously interested' in Chelsea's Mudryk replacement
arts.sum: However, Sky Germany have revealed that Gittens is a “top transfer target” for Bayern Munich, with Vincent Kompany’s side looking to sign at least one new winger following rumours that Leroy Sane and Kingsley Coman could both leave this summer. Manchester United are reportedly “seriously interested” in signing Borussia Dortmund wonderkid Jamie Gittens this year.
